## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] Does not read auth token files or ask for API keys.
- [ ] Does not automate editor extensions or scrape UI.
- [ ] Does not push, merge, or delete worktrees without explicit user approval.
- [ ] Updates docs for user-visible CLI behavior.
